prompt: A circular avatar frame for a mobile game, Easter holiday theme. The frame is an ornate golden-bronze circular border with warm metallic sheen and intricate floral engravings. Pink cherry blossoms, yellow daffodils, and purple tulips are arranged lushly around the entire ring. Three colorful decorated Easter eggs (pastel pink with gold dots, sky blue with white stripes, mint green with flower pattern) nestle at the bottom center of the frame. A small cute white fluffy Easter bunny with pink ears sits at the top of the frame. The overall color palette is warm and pastel: gold, pink, lavender, mint green, soft yellow. Game UI art style, 3D render with glossy material, vibrant festive colors, clean design, transparent background. ONE SINGLE circular frame, do NOT generate multiple frames or a grid layout.
